title: Review Tatari VDR materials in detail
description: Just got access to the Tatari virtual data room. Need to review all documents thoroughly before preparing questions.

title: Prepare elaborate set of questions on Tatari deal
description: After reviewing the VDR, send a more detailed set of questions to the sell-side team. Told them to expect questions by Monday.

title: Analyze Tatari revenue growth slowdown (2025 vs 2024)
description: Net revenue growth dropped from 31.5% (2024/2023) to 7% (2025/2024) before projected rebound to 30%. Understand the drivers and validate confidence in rebound.

title: Evaluate Tatari subsidiary structure and carve-out potential
description: Three subsidiaries: Tatari DSP, Upstream TV, Vault Ad Solutions. 95% of revenue from Tatari. Upstream pipes flow through Tatari Corp. Assess whether a carve-out makes sense.

title: Determine attendance at Cannes Lions Conference week of June 22
description: Philippe and his team will be at Cannes the week of June 22nd. Decide if Christopher or team should attend for in-person meetings on the Tatari deal.

title: Prepare initial indication of interest for Tatari
description: Sell-side is looking for initial indications in the first half of July. Need to complete diligence and formulate a preliminary offer.

title: Assess competing offer structure and capital sources
description: An existing offer has a lot of structure and questionable capital sources per the banker. Understand what was offered to position competitively.

title: Evaluate founder retention and cap table dynamics
description: Founders own 60%, angels/individuals own 40%, no institutional capital. All three founders (Philippe + two tech co-founders) plan to stay post-transaction. Factor into deal structuring.

title: Research Tatari's key customer base and concentration risk
description: ~300 brands total; ~100 enterprise spending $10M+/year. Key names include Ro Health, Chime, Nutrifold. Performance/DTC focused. Analyze customer concentration.

title: Analyze Tatari's CTV vs linear revenue mix and trajectory
description: CTV now >50% of revenue (up from 10% four years ago), linear ~45%. Understand the mix shift implications for valuation and growth sustainability.

title: Evaluate Tatari's sales team ramp and ROI
description: Sales team tripled from 6 to 18 in the last 9 months. Assess whether this investment is driving the projected 30% net revenue growth and what further scaling looks like.

title: Understand Upstream TV's run-of-network impression business
description: Upstream generates ~$5M revenue buying run-of-network impressions. Need to understand this revenue stream's margin profile and growth potential.

title: Assess Tatari's direct publisher connections competitive moat
description: Tatari has direct pipes into Disney, Paramount, Fox, Warner Brothers, NBCU via deprecated SSP (Viewpoint acquisition). 90% of CTV inventory flows through top 10 publishers.
